narrative:
Precinct Bokescreek (precinct in Logan County) has 451 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
